title: Ruby Concurrency vs Parallelism for HTTP Workloads
description: A deep dive into Ruby concurrency and parallelism through real HTTP request benchmarks, comparing async, threads, forks, promises, thread pools, and parallel execution for I/O-bound workloads.
author: motebaya

title: Automating Facebook Unfollow with Pure DOM JavaScript
description: A lightweight browser console script that automates unfollowing Facebook accounts or pages by interacting directly with DOM elements and UI menus using pure JavaScript.
author: motebaya

title: Automating TikTok Video Upload & Scheduling with Playwright
description: A practical breakdown of automating TikTok desktop uploads using Playwright. Learn how to handle file uploads, captions, scheduling, visibility settings, and TikTok’s built-in content checks inside a fully automated posting workflow.
author: motebaya

title: Python Async vs Sync I/O: A Cross-Version Benchmark Deep Dive
description: A comprehensive experiment comparing async (aiohttp/aiofiles) vs sync (requests/ThreadPoolExecutor) I/O performance in Python, benchmarked across Python 3.10 through 3.13t (free-threaded/no-GIL) with real file and network workloads.
author: motebaya

title: Reverse Engineering SibSoft's Encrypted Perl Modules
description: A step-by-step walkthrough of reverse engineering SibSoft's Perl source code protection scheme — from ELF binary analysis and Ghidra decompilation to extracting a 256-byte cipher key and reimplementing their RC4-variant decryption in Python.
author: motebaya
